gaps: a derived era/Term field on the case row so historical cases can be base-rated against their own period
a query filter for caption shape or period (e.g. admiralty-style 'The <vessel>' captions) to pull era-appropriate priors
surfacing the linked opinion cluster's non-outcome metadata (decision date, reporter citation) in the snapshot when the docket itself is bare
helpful: fedcourts stats disposition base-rates as a calibration anchor
fedcourts query priors showing how jurisdictional dismissals vs merits outcomes are labeled
fedcourts paths for resolving the output layout
notes: Snapshot was nearly empty, so the prediction leaned on the corpus base rates plus background legal-historical knowledge of the caption. stats --group-by disposition was the single most useful input for choosing between 'dismissed' and the modal 'other' label.
